text:
uname -av: FreeBSD blubee.me 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0 r325229: Wed Nov  1 04:31:48 CST 2017     root@:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Testing a port in a FreeBSD 12 jail, uname -av
FreeBSD worker 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0 r325229: Wed Nov  1 04:31:48 CST 2017     root@:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

llvm crashed.

The crash logs are very large so I'll put them here: http://s000.tinyupload.com/?file_id=40522222351827337044
